HomePage.title: Your Files Stay With You. Always.
HomePage.subtitle: Most websites take your files to their computers. We don't. Everything you do stays inside your own screen. It's 100% private, 100% free, and 100% safe.

toolDescriptions.redactor: Paint over private words so they are gone forever.
toolDescriptions.cleanExif: Wipe away hidden map data and private details.
toolDescriptions.password: Make very strong codes that only you know.
toolDescriptions.textEncryptor: Turn your writing into a secret code.
toolDescriptions.compress: Shrink big photos so they are easier to send.
toolDescriptions.heic: Make iPhone photos work on any computer.
toolDescriptions.mediaConverter: Change video or music files to work better.
toolDescriptions.svgToPng: Turn drawing files into simple photos.
toolDescriptions.blur: Hide faces or private things in your photos.
toolDescriptions.merger: Put many PDF files together into one.
toolDescriptions.pdfToWord: Make a PDF something you can type in.
toolDescriptions.unlock: Open a file that is locked with a password.
toolDescriptions.pdfToImg: Save each page of your PDF as a photo.
toolDescriptions.split: Pick just the pages you need from a big file.

redactor.before: A letter with your phone number.
redactor.after: The number is gone under a solid black line.

clean-exif.before: A photo that tells people where you live.
clean-exif.after: A private photo with all map data wiped clean.

encrypt.before: A secret note anyone can read.
encrypt.after: Jumbled letters that only you can unlock.

compress.after: A fast, light photo that looks the same.

heic.before: An iPhone photo that won't open on PC.
heic.after: A standard photo that works everywhere.

media-converter.before: A video that won't play on your phone.
media-converter.after: A perfect file that plays on any device.

svg-to-png.after: A simple photo for everyone to see.

blur.before: A photo showing a private face.
blur.after: The same photo with the face hidden.

merger.after: One clean document with everything inside.

pdf-to-word.before: A PDF you can't edit or type in.
pdf-to-word.after: A Word file you can fix and change.

unlock.after: A file you can read and print.

pdf-to-img.before: A document you have to scroll through.

split.after: The exact 2 pages you actually needed.

HomePage.toolSubtitle: Easy tools to help you with your {category}.

session.label: Cleanup
session.clearDesc: Wipe away everything you've done and start fresh on your screen.

cta.title: Your Privacy is a Right.
cta.desc: We built this because we believe your files should stay yours. No cost, no tricks, just privacy.

HomePage.mergeDropDesc: Select files from your computer to put them together.

step1.title: Pick a File
step1.desc: Select the document or photo you want to fix.

step2.title: Fix it Privately
step2.desc: Our website works like a magic tool inside your screen. Your file never travels over the internet.

step3.title: Save it Back
step3.desc: Download your finished file. Since it never left your device, nobody else ever saw it.

footer.whyDesc: We believe privacy is a right, not a luxury. That's why these tools will always be free for everyone.
